items.title: Leicester's 'horrible' journey ends with relegation
items.summary: Leicester City have been relegated to League One from the Championship after a 2-2 draw with Hull City on Tuesday night.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: NFL Draft: What are the 10 Best Draft Classes Produced by a College Since 2000?
items.summary: With Ohio State set to potentially make top-10 history on Thursday, we look at the 10 best draft classes produced by a college in a single season.

items.title: Venus, 45, sets sights on French Open after loss
items.summary: Venus Williams, 45, said Tuesday after losing her 10th straight singles match that she is considering playing at Roland Garros next month.
